content.en:
Ye Tian is not short of resources now, and with the Chaos Alchemy Technique, which is more powerful than the Xuanxuan Technique, the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique, he is definitely very quick to improve his strength.

After entering the Time True Tower, Ye Tian chose a retreat room, and then opened the Time Array, placing countless Chaos Crystals and many Energy Crystals into the formation center.

When the big array is opened, there is no need for Ye Tian to worry, and it will not affect Ye Tian's cultivation.

Otherwise, if you turn on the time to speed up, your own divine power will continue to be consumed, and if you cultivate and improve the strength of your physical body, it will be very affected.

Because of this, the stronger the strength, the more powerful it is, it basically uses the time array, rather than relying on itself to urge time acceleration.

Of course, it would be very good if you asked a strong person to urge time to speed up your cultivation and help you cultivate, but absolutely no one is so stupid that they will help themselves like this.

Under the consumption of a large amount of resources, Ye Tian gradually cultivated the first level of the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique to the consummation realm, and his strength did not improve much, but his foundation was a little stronger.

After that, Ye Tian began to cultivate the second level of the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique, and he soon cultivated the second level to the consummation realm.

"Beginning to cultivate the third level of the Golden Ape Alchemy, according to the comparison with the Xuanxu Jue, the third level of the Golden Ape Alchemy is equivalent to the first to the third layer of the Xuanxu Jue True Spirit Chapter; the third level of the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique corresponds to the fourth to the sixth layers of the Xuanxu Jue True Spirit Chapter; and the third major achievement realm of the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique corresponds to the seventh to ninth layers of the Xuanxu Jue True Spirit Chapter. And if the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique is in the third consummation realm, it far surpasses the Xuanxuan Secret True Spirit Chapter!"

Ye Tiandao.

And this is only a preliminary comparison, in fact, at the same level, the increase in the strength of Ye Tian's physical body, as well as the degree of divine power and divine soul transformation brought by the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique, surpassed the Xuanxuan Jue True Spirit Chapter.

Of course.

The consumption of resources by the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique was also very high, but Ye Tian had obtained a large amount of cultivation innate origin things before, so there was no shortage of resources for the time being, which was enough for him to impact the True Ancestor realm.

Year after year, Ye Tian has been in retreat in the Time True Pagoda for a billion years, while the outside world has only passed a hundred thousand years.

After such a long period of time, Ye Tian naturally consumed a lot of innate origin things, but the progress was also very fast.

Now, he had cultivated the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique to the third major achievement realm, and it should be regarded as the middle stage of the Great Achievement realm, which was equivalent to the eighth layer realm of the previous Xuan Xuan Jue True Spirit Chapter.

The third major achievement of the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique made Ye Tian's physical body far surpass before, and his strength naturally skyrocketed a lot.

Now his strength has steadily entered the True Monarch List, and he is also at the top of the True Monarch List, ranking 62nd!

......

Ape Giant City.

When Ye Tian came out of the Time True Tower, he saw many True Monarchs, and they greeted Ye Tian one after another, and their tones were full of respect.

And his subordinate Yanglong Zhenjun also came to Ye Tian's front for the first time.

"Master, congratulations on achieving the 62nd place on the True Monarch List!"

Yanglong Zhenjun congratulated.

He was very excited now, although it was not that he had become the 62nd on the True Monarch List, but as Ye Tian's servant, he also felt very honored!

Ranked 62nd on the True Monarch List, what an honor this is!

As far as he knew, the True Monarchs who could rank in the top 100 on the True Monarch List were almost all the chief disciples among the disciples of the True Monarchs of the top powers!

Moreover, they have all cultivated for countless years, and their physical bodies, divine souls, and divine powers have all advanced to the point where they cannot be advanced, and the prototype of the Great Dao is at 99,999 meters, and they have mastered at least one Origin Divine Power, and they are only one step away from the half-step True Ancestor.

These True Monarchs are all famous and intimidating countless realms of Chaos, and have even defeated or killed True Ancestors who are not weak, and one person is comparable to an ordinary great force.

For example, the Void Heaven One Vein, before this, there was only one such True Monarch, that is, the True Monarch of Longhai.

As for the Dawn True Monarch, although he was also very powerful, he still did not enter the top 100 of the True Monarch List.

But now, Ye Tian has stepped into this level, and he is not a newcomer, but ranks 62nd on the True Monarch List, which is not low.

Moreover, Ye Tian is proficient in a large number of chaotic supernatural powers, and his life-saving ability is against the sky, so he is definitely very difficult, even those true monarchs who are ranked higher than Ye Tian probably do not dare to offend Ye Tian.

Can he not be proud to have such an owner?

"What's the big deal lately?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Master, some of the inheritances of the ruins of the Heavenly Ape Sect have been obtained by other true monarchs one after another, and the origin of the Heavenly Ape Sect has gradually become clear, this is the information collected by the subordinates about the Heavenly Ape Sect!"

Yanglong Zhenjun handed over a document and said.

"Oh, even the origin of the Heavenly Ape Sect is almost clear?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

He had been in retreat for all these years, so he didn't know much about the outside world.

After taking the information, Ye Tian looked at it carefully.

Some of this information he had known before, but some of it had not been known before.

"The Heavenly Ape Sect is one of the subordinate forces of the Holy Ape Sect! The Holy Ape Sect has many Dao Ancestors, as well as the strongest Dao Ancestors!"

Ye Tian was very interested in this information.

In addition, the news about the domain is all on it.

"It turns out that the Domain Realm is a world above the Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But this information is not complete, such as what the specific situation of the domain realm is, and where the domain boundary of the Heavenly Ape Sect is located, but this point is not pointed out, and perhaps other true monarchs do not know.

"Maybe the master knows!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Coming out of the ruins of the Heavenly Ape Sect, Ye Tian took the initiative to contact his master.

-------------

Rumble!!!!

The consciousness incarnation of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor descended and appeared in front of Ye Tian.

"Master!" Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Apprentice, what is the matter of finding a teacher?" asked the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

Ye Tian asked, "Master, the disciple has obtained a mutilated version of the Chaos Alchemy Inheritance at the Heavenly Ape Sect Ruins, and the level of this Chaos Alchemy Technique is far higher than that of the Xuanxuan Technique. Moreover, the domain realm where the Heavenly Ape Sect is located seems to be very strong, with a large number of Dao Ancestors, where is the domain realm? The cultivation system there seems to be very high!"

"Oh, you've actually obtained a Chaos Alchemy Inheritance?

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor was surprised.

He had just found that Ye Tian's physical body had changed a little, and the shadow of the Xuan Xuan Jue seemed to be gone, and now he knew that Ye Tian had changed the Chaos Alchemy Technique.

He didn't ask for Ye Tian's Chaos Alchemy Technique, because many Chaos Alchemy Technique inheritances were not allowed to leak out.

"In fact, chaos is not only what we know. Even if the chaotic region we are in is very large, even if it takes a long time for the Dao Ancestors to cross this area, this is not the whole of chaos. There are no boundaries in our chaotic region, and the boundaries come from other chaotic regions. It's just that our chaotic area is wrapped in a forbidden area, and even Dao Ancestor can't pass through the forbidden area. The reason why the inheritance of the Domain Realm appeared here was because a fragment of the Domain Realm rushed through the forbidden area, descended on this area, and slowly evolved into a universe!" explained the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"Is it this universe I live in, or is it another universe?"

Ye Tian's eyes widened and asked.

"It's the universe you live in, so now there will be domain realm ruins in this quasi-Dao realm, maybe there will be more advanced domain realm ruins in the future, I'm afraid that even Dao Ancestors will be tempted at that time, so as to enter your world!"

In fact, this time, the appearance of the Heavenly Ape Sect's various inheritances also made the Dao Ancestors stunned.

They didn't expect that such a weak Heavenly Ape Sect would have such a high-level inheritance, even better than the inheritance where their power was located.

It's just that there are no treasures that make Dao Ancestors crazy for the time being, so Dao Ancestors can still abide by their agreement and will not descend to the quasi-Dao realm.

But this agreement will definitely not last long, and one day, the Dao Ancestors will come to this realm.

At that time, it was not necessarily a good thing for this world!

Ye Tian also understood this truth, and immediately felt the pressure.

"You must grow up as soon as possible, you can't rely on Shizun completely, although Shizun is strong, there are definitely many Dao Ancestors who are stronger than Shizun!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
